{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent effectively restructured the text to improve logical flow and clarity, addressing conceptual issues and proposing reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The revised text demonstrates a clear understanding of the argument chain, identifying inconsistencies and proposing minimal repairs.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring evidence-claim alignment.",
    "R1.6": "The rewritten text exhibits writing polish, with consistent register and no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "The output marks confidence for each recommendation, including uncertainty in the model's performance.",
    "RX.3": "The revised text covers exactly the agreed scope, without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, with no regressions or introduction of new errors.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "R1.3": 0.92,
    "R1.6": 0.98,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.97,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent effectively restructured the text to improve logical flow and clarity, addressing conceptual issues and proposing reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The revised text demonstrates a clear understanding of the argument chain, identifying inconsistencies and proposing minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.6: The rewritten text exhibits writing polish, with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The output marks confidence for each recommendation, including uncertainty in the model's performance.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text covers exactly the agreed scope, without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no regressions or introduction of new errors.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
